hooks.name: Contrarian Take
hooks.example: Most people think rate cuts are bullish. They're wrong.

hooks.name: Surprising Statistic
hooks.example: 73% of portfolio managers don't realize their China exposure has doubled.

hooks.name: Personal Observation
hooks.template: I've watched {X} for {timeframe}. Here's what nobody talks about:
hooks.example: I've watched currency markets for 15 years. Here's what nobody talks about:

hooks.name: Bold Prediction
hooks.template: In {timeframe}, we'll look back at {event} as the moment everything changed.
hooks.example: In 5 years, we'll look back at the BRICS summit as the moment everything changed.

hooks.name: Honest Confession
hooks.template: I used to believe {X}. Then I saw {evidence}.
hooks.example: I used to believe emerging markets were uninvestable. Then I saw the India data.

hooks.name: Provocative Question
hooks.template: Why does everyone ignore {X} when analyzing {Y}?
hooks.example: Why does everyone ignore currency risk when analyzing international equities?

hooks.name: Pattern Recognition
hooks.example: Every time the yield curve uninverts, volatility spikes within 6 months.

hooks.name: Hidden Warning
hooks.template: The {X} everyone is celebrating? It's hiding a bigger problem.
hooks.example: The earnings beat everyone is celebrating? It's hiding a bigger problem.

hooks.name: Myth Buster
hooks.example: The biggest myth in macro investing: diversification protects you in a crisis.

hooks.name: Insider Perspective
hooks.template: After {X} years in {field}, here's what I wish someone told me:
hooks.example: After 20 years in fixed income, here's what I wish someone told me:

hooks.name: Unexpected Comparison
hooks.template: {Current event} reminds me of {historical event}. Here's why that matters:
hooks.example: Today's market structure reminds me of 2007. Here's why that matters:

hooks.name: Simple Truth
hooks.example: The simplest explanation for gold's rally? Central banks don't trust each other.
